description: A genre scene set at a Venetian canal-side doorway. A woman in a brown dress and red cap sits on a stone step at the water's edge, tending to laundry or bundles of cloth. Two small children sit beside her near the green water. A tall wooden gondola oar rises from the left foreground. Pigeons fly from a latticed window above. The architecture features ornate stone arches, weathered plaster walls, and a green wooden door. The still canal water reflects the figures and building in soft, muted tones. The atmosphere is quiet and domestic.
